phrases.intent_en: Ask for the next train to Lausanne
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure part le prochain train pour Lausanne ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR par luh proh-SHAN TRAN poor loh-ZAN
phrases.cultural_note: Trains between Geneva and Lausanne run very frequently — roughly every 20 minutes — and the journey takes about 33 to 50 minutes depending on the service.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a ticket
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter un billet de train ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEEZH ash-TAY un bee-YAY duh TRAN
phrases.cultural_note: CFF/SBB tickets can be bought at the machines, the ticket counter, or via the SBB Mobile app. Buying in advance online often yields cheaper fares.

responses.english: At the machines or at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform the train leaves from
phrases.text_local: De quel quai part le train pour Berne ?
phrases.pronunciation: duh kel KAY par luh TRAN poor BAIRN
phrases.cultural_note: Platform information is displayed on large screens throughout the station. Swiss trains are famously punctual — the departure time shown is when the train moves.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the free public transport included with hotel stay
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je obtenir mon laissez-passer de transports gratuits avec mon hôtel ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEEZH ob-tuh-NEER mohn leh-SAY-pah-SAY duh trohnss-POR grah-TWEE ah-VEK mohn oh-TEL
phrases.cultural_note: The Geneva Transport Card (Transport Card Genève) gives hotel guests free use of all public transport in the canton — ask for it at check-in.

responses.english: Ask for the Geneva Transport Card at your hotel.
responses.phonetic: duh-mahn-DAY lah zhuh-NEV trans-PORT KARD ah voh-truh oh-TEL
responses.local: Demandez la Geneva Transport Card à votre hôtel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tram stop is outside the station
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'arrêt de tram devant la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah-REH duh TRAM duh-VOHN lah GAR
phrases.cultural_note: Geneva's tram network is extensive and reliable; multiple tram lines stop directly in front of Cornavin station, connecting the city centre, airport and suburbs.

responses.english: Just at the exit, on the right.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ah lah sor-TEE, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.local: Juste à la sortie, sur la droite.
